nl_query: Show all question papers with total marks exceeding 100.
failed_sql:
SELECT qp.id, qp.title, SUM(em.marks_awarded) AS total_marks
FROM   question_paper qp
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.question_id = qp.id
WHERE  qp.is_locked = TRUE
  AND  qp.status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP  BY qp.id, qp.title
HAVING SUM(em.marks_awarded) > 100
ORDER  BY total_marks DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): question_paper.status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
